facts: Famous for the energetic 'Halperke' traditional group dance.
Mainly wear highly recognizable, distinct loose-fitting dynamic outfits.
Major celebrations center around Nowruz with massive open fires in the mountains.

slides.name: Kurdish Traditional Dress
slides.description: Brightly colored garments with detailed hand-woven embroidery.

slides.name: The Daf Instrument
slides.description: A prominent frame drum used widely in local cultural and spiritual music.
